title: Deny by default
description: Unmatched permission requests are denied; new resources and roles start with no access and are granted explicitly.
body: Use when designing or editing a permission model, adding a resource type, or introducing a role. Do not add a broad allow rule to make a feature work. Actions: confirm the policy's fallthrough is deny; grant the narrowest scope that satisfies the use case; add the new resource to the matrix with explicit allowed roles. Validation signals include a test asserting an undefined permission resolves to deny and that a new role cannot reach existing resources. Risk boundary: a default-allow fallthrough is a blocking finding requiring human review.
